parameters.message:
=Hello {{$json["client_name"]}}! 👋

Your visa application for *{{$json["destination"]}}* has been created.

📋 Application ID: {{$json["app_id"]}}

Please send us the following documents:
• Passport (front page)
• Recent passport-size photo
• 3-month bank statement
• Hotel booking confirmation
• Return flight ticket

Reply to this message or call us at +91-120-XXXXXX

*Uniglobe MKOV Travel*

parameters.subject: =Your Visa Application — {{$json["app_id"]}} — Documents Required
parameters.text:
=Dear {{$json["client_name"]}},

Thank you for choosing Uniglobe MKOV Travel!

Your visa application has been created:
• Application ID: {{$json["app_id"]}}
• Destination: {{$json["destination"]}}
• Visa Type: {{$json["visa_type"]}}

Please submit the following documents at your earliest:
1. Passport (front page scan)
2. Recent passport-size photo
3. 3-month bank statement
4. Hotel booking confirmation
5. Return flight tickets
6. Travel insurance

Login to your portal to upload documents:
https://visa.uniglobemkov.in/client

Your login: {{$json["client_email"]}}

Best regards,
Uniglobe MKOV Visa Team
+91-120-XXXXXX

parameters.subject: =Visa Update — {{$json["app_id"]}} — {{$json["new_status"]}}

parameters.message:
